query:
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, c.name as customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name IN ('Albany Family Doctors', 'Aspley Firstcare Doctors', 'Ausdocs Carindale Pty Ltd', 'Kawana Family Clinic', 'Stafford Heights Medical Practice')
  AND (s.planName LIKE '%eFax%' OR s.planName LIKE '%fax%' OR s.planName LIKE '%Rental%')
ORDER BY c.name, s.planName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

  AND (s.planName LIKE '%eFax%' OR s.planName LIKE '%fax%' OR s.planName LIKE '%Rental%')
ORDER BY c.name, s.planName;
